meta.title: An cluiche laethúil focal
meta.description: Buille faoi thuairim an focal i bhfolach i 6 iarracht (nó níos lú). Tá bhfreagra nua ar fáil gach lá!
meta.keywords: Gaeilge, bhfreagra, focal, súgradh, cluiche, ar líne, buille faoi thuairim, gach lá

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Irish. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Irish as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Irish. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Irish. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Irish. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Irish. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Irish. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Irish. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: Níor thriail tú aon fhocail go fóill!
text.share_challenge_win: D'éirigh liom Wordle an lae inniu i {n} iarracht. An féidir leat é a shárú?
text.share_challenge_lose: Níor éirigh liom Wordle an lae inniu. An féidir leatsa?
text.notification_partial_word: Cuir isteach focal iomlán le do thoil
text.hard_mode_position: Mód deacair: caithfidh {letter} a bheith i suíomh {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Mód deacair: caithfidh {letter} a bheith sa bhuille faoi thuairim

help.title: Conas a imirt
help.text_1_1_2: i sé iarracht nó níos lú.
help.text_1_2: Ní mór do gach buille faoi thuairim a bheith ina fhocal bailí cúig litir. Brúigh an cnaipe Iontrála chun do thuairim a chur isteach.
help.text_1_3: Tar éis duit buille faoi thuairim a dhéanamh, athróidh na tíleanna dath chun a léiriú cé na litreacha de do fhocal atá ceart nó beagnach ceart.
help.text_2_1: tá sé sa bhfocal agus sa suíomh ceart!
help.text_2_2: tá sé sa bhfocal, ach ní sa suíomh ceart.
help.text_2_3: nach bhfuil i láthair san fhocal atá tú ag iarraidh a buille faoi thuairim a dhéanamh.
help.text_3: Beidh focal nua ar fáil gach lá!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

ui.word_info_desc: Sainmhíniú agus ealaín AI tar éis an chluiche
ui.install_app_desc: Imir as líne agus faigh deilbhín
ui.play_more_languages: Imir tuilleadh teangacha le do staitisticí iomlána a fheiceáil!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Imir Wordle go laethúil mar aip
ui.no_games_yet: Níl aon chluiche imeartha agat fós. Roghnaigh teanga le tosú!
ui.easy_desc: Glactar le haon fhocal, fiú mura bhfuil sé san fhoclóir
ui.normal_desc: Caithfidh buillí faoi thuairim a bheith ina bhfocail bhailí ón bhfoclóir
ui.hard_desc: Caithfear leideanna nochta a úsáid sna buillí faoi thuairim ina dhiaidh
ui.todays_word_reveal: Focal an lae — Imir lena nochtadh!
ui.future_word: Níor imríodh an focal seo fós. Tar ar ais níos déanaí!
ui.difficulty_locked: Ní féidir an deacracht a athrú tar éis buille faoi thuairim
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
